hero.title: The first Autonomous E-commerce Platform in Latin America.
hero.subtitle: Brazilian engineering. Fixed cost. Agentic operation.

columns.title: AGENTIC.
columns.text: The technology that most platforms try to "tack on" as an accessory—but few manage to integrate into the core to actually run the operation for you.

columns.title: FRICTION.
columns.text: The chasm between having a product and profiting online, currently filled with abusive fees on your sales, manual processes, and fragmented tools.

columns.title: AUTONOMOUS.
columns.text: The real solution. A platform that operates itself. No "tax on your growth." Native agentic efficiency.

hero2.main_heading: WE ARE REVOLUTIONIZING THE WAY E-COMMERCE IS OPERATED.

hero3.title:
INTRODUCING
HERO
hero3.subtitle: Your Shortcut to Innovation Starts Here.
hero3.paragraph1: Hero is about more than cutting costs—it's about unlocking potential. Boost productivity with a personalized, adaptive AI agent that learns and evolves with your team.
hero3.paragraph2: This isn't just a return on investment—it's a return on innovation.

pricing.title: One price, unlimited possibilities.
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees, no surprises. Just one monthly subscription to unlock the full power of your autonomous operation.
